title: Japanese bond yields are the highest in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from PM Takaichi have markets nervous
summary_full: Japanese bond yields have reached the highest levels in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from Prime Minister Takaichi have made markets nervous.
summary_public: Japanese bond yields have reached the highest levels in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from Prime Minister Takaichi have made markets nervous.
